description: A technician is assembling MLI blankets to provide thermal protection for a satellite.

nodes.task_description: Cut the multiple layers of reflective material (e.g., Mylar) and separator netting to the correct size based on a template.
Stack the layers in the correct sequence.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent assembles the layers in the specified order.

nodes.task_description: Sew the edges of the blanket together and add grounding straps as required by the design.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent completes the fabrication of the MLI blanket.
